attacking_style: Late-race punchy attacks in final 2-3km on short climbs. Multiple repeated accelerations rather than single decisive move.
team_tactics: Limited team support evident in critical moments; positioned to launch solo efforts rather than rely on leadout or pace-setting domestiques.
terrain_preference: Hilly one-day classics with short, steep climbs in finale. Struggles when faced with superior pure sprinters on flatter finishes.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain attacks when stronger riders (particularly fast finishers with climbing ability) mark and close gaps. Lacks decisive finishing speed after multiple efforts.
key_patterns: Launches multiple attacks rather than single move, showing endurance over explosive power (2 races)
Strong late-race climbing reserves maintained even after missing positioning (2 races)
Attacks inside final 2-3km on climbs, not long-range moves (2 races)
form_trajectory: neutral: Podium finish at Amstel but attacks easily neutralized at Tour, suggesting inconsistent results against top opposition
